CustomField.description: Rollup count of critical-path nepa_required_permit__c child records in an active (non-terminal) status. When this value is greater than zero, NEPA_Litigation_Risk_Scorer applies a permit gap penalty. When a permit flips to Issued/Denied/Withdrawn the rollup decrements and the scorer re-fires automatically via the field change trigger.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Number of critical-path permits not yet issued, denied, or withdrawn. Drives the permit gap penalty in the litigation risk score.
CustomField.label: Blocked Critical Permits
